home.title: BA Modding Toolkit Web
home.subtitle: Blue Archive Modding Toolkit Web Version
home.instruction1: A session ID will be automatically assigned and saved in your browser
home.instruction2: Upload files and submit tasks, the system will process in background
home.instruction3: You can close the page and come back within 24 hours to check status and download results
home.instruction4: All files will be automatically cleaned up after 24 hours

features.updateDesc: Update old mods to the latest game version
features.crcDesc: Fix or check file CRC values

update.title: Mod Update
update.description: Upload old Mod file and new game resource file, the system will migrate resources from old Mod to new file.
update.oldModHintLabel: Upload old Mod's .bundle file to extract resources
update.targetBundleHintLabel: Upload new game's .bundle file to inject resources (Android-Steam cross-platform supported)
update.oldModHint: Drop or click to select old Mod file (.bundle)
update.targetBundleHint: Drop or click to select new game bundle (.bundle)
update.crcCorrectionDesc: Correct CRC value of output file for game validation

pack.title: Asset Pack
pack.description: Upload asset files and target Bundle, the system will pack assets into the target Bundle.
pack.targetBundleHintLabel: Upload target game's .bundle file to inject assets into
pack.assetFolderHint: Drop or click to select asset files
pack.targetBundleHint: Drop or click to select target Bundle file (.bundle)

extract.title: Asset Extract
extract.description: Upload Bundle file, the system will extract specified asset types from it.
extract.bundleFileHintLabel: Upload game's .bundle file, the system will extract and package resources for download
extract.bundleFileHint: Drop or click to select Bundle file

crc.title: CRC Tool
crc.description: Upload the modified Bundle file and the original Bundle file. The system will correct the CRC value of the modified file to match the original.
crc.modifiedFileHintLabel: Upload modified .bundle file that needs CRC fix
crc.originalFileHintLabel: Upload original unmodified game .bundle file to provide CRC value
crc.modifiedFileHint: Drop or click to select modified Bundle file (needs CRC fix)
crc.originalFileHint: Drop or click to select original Bundle file (provides target CRC)
crc.checkOnlyDesc: Only calculate CRC, do not fix
